name: Salad Ole W/Chili Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 15 oz. pinto beans, drained and rinsed
1 1/2 cups frozen whole kernel corn, thawed
2 pickled jalapeno peppers, stemmed, halved and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice in salted water as directed on the package. (The rice can be cooked ahead and chilled.)
2. Combine cooked rice, beans, corn, green onion, and sweet pepper in a large bowl. Toss lightly to mix.
3. In a blender container or food processor bowl, combine oil, lime juice, vinegar, brown sugar, jalapeno peppers, chili powder, cumin, and salt. Cover and blend or process until smooth.
4. Pour dressing over rice mixture; toss to coat. Cover and chill until serving time or up to 2 days. Serve at room temperature. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
5. Serve with Oklahoma Style Brisket Sandwiches.
